Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MLflow App.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MLflow App.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: arn:aws[a-z\-]*:sagemaker:[a-z0-9\-]*:[0-9]{12}:mlflow-app/.*  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

MlflowAppId.description: The server-generated identifier of the MLflow App.
MlflowAppId.markdownDescription:
The server-generated identifier of the MLflow App.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.description: The name of the MLflow App.
Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the MLflow App.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 256  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9](-*[a-zA-Z0-9]){0,255}$  
Update requires: Replacement

ArtifactStoreUri.description: The S3 URI for a general purpose bucket to use as the MLflow App artifact store.
ArtifactStoreUri.markdownDescription:
The S3 URI for a general purpose bucket to use as the MLflow App artifact store.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Pattern: (https|s3)://([^/]+)/?(.*)  
Update requires: No interruption

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for an IAM role in your account that the MLflow App uses to access the artifact store in Amazon S3.
RoleArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for an IAM role in your account that the MLflow App uses to access the artifact store in Amazon S3.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 20  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: arn:aws[a-z\-]*:iam::\d{12}:role/?[a-zA-Z_0-9+=,.@\-_/]+  
Update requires: Replacement

ModelRegistrationMode.description: Whether to enable or disable automatic registration of new MLflow models to the SageMaker Model Registry.
ModelRegistrationMode.markdownDescription:
Whether to enable or disable automatic registration of new MLflow models to the SageMaker Model Registry.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: AutoModelRegistrationEnabled | AutoModelRegistrationDisabled  
Update requires: No interruption

WeeklyMaintenanceWindowStart.description: The day and time of the week in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) 24-hour standard time that weekly maintenance updates are scheduled. For example: Tue:03:30.
WeeklyMaintenanceWindowStart.markdownDescription:
The day and time of the week in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) 24-hour standard time that weekly maintenance updates are scheduled. For example: Tue:03:30.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 9  
Pattern: (Mon|Tue|Wed|Thu|Fri|Sat|Sun):([01]\d|2[0-3]):([0-5]\d)  
Update requires: No interruption

Status.description: The status of the MLflow App.
Status.markdownDescription:
The status of the MLflow App.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: Creating | Created | CreateFailed | Updating | Updated | UpdateFailed | Deleting | DeleteFailed | Deleted  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

MlflowVersion.description: The MLflow version used by the MLflow App.
MlflowVersion.markdownDescription:
The MLflow version used by the MLflow App.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 16  
Pattern: [0-9]*.[0-9]*.[0-9]*  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CreationTime.description: The date and time that the MLflow App was created.
CreationTime.markdownDescription:
The date and time that the MLflow App was created.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

LastModifiedTime.description: The date and time that the MLflow App was last modified.
LastModifiedTime.markdownDescription:
The date and time that the MLflow App was last modified.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

---

Update requires: No interruption
